case_title: KAILA VANGELL VS. LEV NEMCHUK ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, ANNA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, ANNA AS TO PLAINTIFF VANGELL, KAILA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,089.00 FILED BY VANGELL, KAILA AS TO DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, LEV NEMCHUK, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-04-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
FILED SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR. FILED BY DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, ANNA AS TO PLAINTIFF VANGELL, KAILA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANGELL, KAILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, LEV NEMCHUK, ANNA $880.91 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.91, THIS AMOUNT IS BASED ON THE COST OF TWO CLEANINGS OF THE COUCH CAUSED BY A. NEMCHUK'S CATS (370). AND 75% OF HTE COST OF REPAIR TO THE DOOR FRAME (300), REFLECTING A. NEMCHUK'S PARTICIPATION IN MOVING THE COUCH AND THE FACT THAT THE DOOR FRAME REPAIR COST IS UNREASONABLE IN LIGHT OF THE MINOR DAMAGE FROM MOVING THE COUCH. PLAINTIFF IS LIABLE FOR UTILITIES PURSUANT TO THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEMCHUK, LEV

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF KAILA VANGELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEV NEMCHUK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANA NEMCHUK IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
